title: Shield of Undying
description: Shield of Undying crafting using smithing table
body:
Place a gold ingot a shield and a totem of undying in smithing table to craft a "Shield of Undying" Just works as normal shield and totem of undying but merged together to both block attacks and protect you from dying. When you die you shield pops-up like a totem saves you from death and gives you effects that totem gives you such as - Regeneration II for 40sec - Fire Resistance for 40sec - Absorption II for 5sec #### Smithing Table Recipe ![shield of undying recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f816647905ce6d4e717b21da1cbd01664e0fb6.png) #### Credits After mod version 2 I used a modified version of [Temple66](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/temple66/)'s [Spruce Shield (Gold)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/spruce-shield-gold/) model
### Take a loot at my other projects ### [Fair Fishing Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fair-fishing-loot) ### [No Piglin Brutes 1.16.1+](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-piglinbrutes) ### [Need More Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/need-more-structures)
